top_findings: 4 README sections unmapped: Comparison, Marketplace Installation, Local Development, Operational Notes
Template index.md + essentials/ + ai/ content not removed, will cause dead nav entries
content.config.ts landing collection still points at template index.md, not 0.index.md
Features page risks becoming a dump of all sub-sections without coherent structure
learn: Map every README H2 to at least one content page before creating files
Remove or redirect all template content before adding new content to avoid orphan nav entries
Update content.config.ts collections when src content structure changes
Numbering scheme (0.index, 1.X, 2.Y) must be consistent with directory removal/renumbering
